texto: The ranks opened covertly to avoid the corpse. The invulnerable dead man forced a way for himself. The youth looked keenly at the ashen face. The wind raised the tawny beard. It moved as if a hand were stroking it. He vaguely desired to walk around and around the body and stare
autor: the impulse of the living to try to read in dead eyes the answer to the Question.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a the impulse of the living to try to read in dead eyes the answer to the Question.: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de esforço, persistência e resultados. O trecho “The ranks opened covertly to avoid the corpse. The invulnerable dead man forced a way for himself…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, stephen-crane, around pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de reflexao.
